functional_requirements: FR001: User can create account using email and password.
FR002: User must verify email before first login.
business_rules: BR002: Password min length is 8 max length is 12.
validations: VAL001: Email uniqueness must be validated.
VAL002: Password length must be between 8 and 12 characters.
risks: Risk of email verification failure blocking user access.
Risk of password length constraint causing user frustration or weak passwords.
missing_information: Password complexity requirements (e.g., special characters, uppercase, numbers).
Email verification mechanism (e.g., link, code, expiry).
Error handling for duplicate email or invalid password.
Account recovery or password reset process.

requirement_items.description: User can create account using email and password.
User must verify email before first login.
Password min length is 8 max length is 12.
Password length must be between 8 and 12 characters.
